name: Sparx 7

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.1 fixture type ID: B844B625-9BEA-455D-B6F0-5AF9ACAA5C03

comment:
The small Sparx 7 comes out big at every light show with its 19 individually controllable 15 W multichip LEDs. It is extremely bright for its size, versatile and ideal for pixel mapping applications. It is also a real visual highlight – shapely, minimal centre bars, circular light emission.
Its enormous variety of effects, colors and patterns mean the smallest member of our star ensemble is guaranteed to set the right mood for every event.

gwSpecs.description:
The small Sparx 7 comes out big at every light show with its 19 individually controllable 15 W multichip LEDs. It is extremely bright for its size, versatile and ideal for pixel mapping applications. It is also a real visual highlight – shapely, minimal centre bars, circular light emission.
Its enormous variety of effects, colors and patterns mean the smallest member of our star ensemble is guaranteed to set the right mood for every event.
